summary: WAZA Admin Dashboard - Complete testing of admin panel feature. Backend: 21/21 tests passed. Frontend: All admin pages working correctly with gold (#FFD600) theme.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic only, charts render correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Chart dimension warnings in console - consider adding minWidth/minHeight to ResponsiveContainer components

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all admin pages load and function correctly)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin and demo users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Dashboard fully functional. All admin endpoints protected by get_current_superadmin dependency. Non-admin users correctly blocked with 403. Frontend uses AdminRoute wrapper for protection. Gold (#FFD600) theme applied to admin section.

tested_endpoints.admin_auth: POST /api/auth/login - returns is_superadmin=true for admin user
tested_endpoints.security_non_admin_blocked: All /api/admin/* endpoints return 403 for non-admin users

tested_frontend_pages.admin_login: Gold theme, WAZA Admin branding, form with data-testid attributes
tested_frontend_pages.admin_overview: KPI cards (users, MRR, subscriptions, messages), Messages chart, Plan distribution pie chart, Recent signups, Top workspaces
tested_frontend_pages.admin_users: User table with search, plan filter, actions (view, suspend, change plan)
tested_frontend_pages.admin_revenues: MRR display, Revenue by plan chart, Transactions table, Export CSV button
tested_frontend_pages.admin_workspaces: Workspace table with owner info, WhatsApp status, agents/contacts count
tested_frontend_pages.admin_settings: Platform name, Backend URL, Maintenance mode toggle, Announcement field, Plan limits (read-only)
tested_frontend_pages.admin_sidebar: All navigation links working (Vue d'ensemble, Utilisateurs, Revenus, Workspaces, Paramètres, Déconnexion)

security_tests.non_admin_login_rejection: demo@waza.africa login shows 'Accès réservé aux administrateurs' error
security_tests.api_protection: All /api/admin/* endpoints return 403 for non-superadmin users
